meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve overwhelmed by AI tools (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome overwhelmed by AI tools. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: overwhelmed by AI tools

content.seo_title: Claude Code Setup: A Freelancer's Guide to Rapid Dev
content.seo_description: Overwhelmed by AI tools? Master Claude Code setup to ship faster. A beginner-friendly checklist using Antigravity to streamline your freelance workflow.
content.answer_block: Stop switching contexts and drowning in tabs. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you consolidate your logic and execution into a single, high-velocity terminal workflow. This setup automates boilerplate, enforces architectural standards, and allows you to ship production-ready features while maintaining total control over your codebase and client deliverables.
content.intro:
The modern freelance landscape is a graveyard of half-finished projects and 'AI-assisted' spaghetti code. You’re juggling a dozen browser tabs, context-switching between LLM interfaces, and losing hours to manual syntax cleanup. The friction isn't the coding; it's the fragmentation.

But the tide is turning. By mastering the Claude Code CLI and pairing it with the structural precision of Antigravity, you transform your terminal into a senior-level force multiplier. This isn't just about automation; it's about reclaiming your time and delivering high-fidelity results before your competition even opens their IDE.

steps.title: Initialize Environment with Claude Code
steps.description: Establish a secure connection to your repository to allow Claude to index your file structure and context.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current project directory, identify the framework, and suggest a folder structure that optimizes for scalability and speed.

steps.title: Define Architectural Constraints
steps.description: Set the rules of the road so your AI assistant doesn't drift into hallucination or deprecated syntax.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a .claude_rules file that strictly enforces TypeScript best practices, modular component design, and prevents the use of legacy libraries.

steps.title: Rapid Feature Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate boilerplate, allowing you to focus on high-level logic rather than repetitive syntax.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a CRUD module for a user profile, including validation, service layer, and unit test stubs following the existing architecture.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate the user profile service with validation'

steps.title: Automated Refactoring Loop
steps.description: Leverage the agent to analyze your code for performance bottlenecks and clean up technical debt in real-time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current codebase for performance bottlenecks and refactor any synchronous database calls into non-blocking async patterns.

steps.title: Final Quality Assurance Check
steps.description: Run a final sweep to ensure the code meets professional production standards before pushing to the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a final code review of all changes. Check for security vulnerabilities, unused imports, and ensure documentation is updated.

pro_tips: Always define a custom .claude_rules file to force the AI to adhere to your specific coding style, saving hours of manual formatting later.
Use Claude Code's 'ask' command to explain complex legacy codebases before you attempt to refactor them, preventing breaking changes.
Keep your Antigravity prompts granular; asking for a full app at once leads to generic output, while small functional blocks lead to production-ready code.
Map your most frequent repetitive tasks to terminal aliases that trigger pre-configured Claude Code prompts.
Review every Claude Code commit; while highly accurate, you remain the lead engineer responsible for the architectural integrity of the client's product.
content.next_steps: Once your environment is configured, start by porting a single, repetitive module from your current project into the Claude Code workflow to benchmark your time savings.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your tools and start building the future of your freelance agency. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
